question: What is the purpose of the data migration guide?
answer: The purpose of this data migration guide is to provide a comprehensive overview of the migration process from the legacy system to the new cloud-based platform.
answer_paragraph: Introduction to Data Migration Guide The purpose of this data migration guide is to provide a comprehensive overview of the migration process from the legacy system to the new cloud-based platform. This guide is intended for IT staff, system administrators, and technical personnel involved in the migration process.

question: What are the phases of the migration timeline?
answer: Planning, Data Assessment, Migration, Testing, and Deployment
answer_paragraph: Table 1: Migration Timeline | Phase | Start Date | End Date | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Planning | 2022-01-01 | 2022-01-31 | Define migration scope, identify resources, and develop project plan | | Data Assessment | 2022-02-01 | 2022-02-28 | Evaluate data quality, identify data gaps, and determine data transformation requirements | | Migration | 2022-03-01 | 2022-03-31 | Migrate data from legacy system to new platform | | Testing | 2022-04-01 | 2022-04-30 | Verify data integrity, test system functionality, and identify defects | | Deployment | 2022-05-01 | 2022-05-31 | Deploy new system, configure settings, and provide training to end-users |

question: Who is responsible for data extraction?
answer_paragraph: Table 2: Data Migration Process | Step | Description | Responsible Party | | --- | --- | --- | | Data Extraction | Extract data from legacy system | IT Staff | | Data Transformation | Transform data to conform to new system requirements | System Administrators | | Data Loading | Load transformed data into new system | Technical Personnel | | Data Verification | Verify data integrity and accuracy | Quality Assurance Team |

question: What is the frequency of data completeness checks?
answer_paragraph: Table 3: Data Quality and Integrity Checks | Check | Description | Frequency | | --- | --- | --- | | Data Completeness | Verify that all required data fields are populated | Daily | | Data Accuracy | Verify that data is accurate and consistent | Weekly | | Data Consistency | Verify that data is consistent across all systems | Monthly |

question: What is the definition of the legacy system?
answer: The existing system that is being replaced
answer_paragraph: Appendix A: Glossary of Terms The following table provides a glossary of terms used in this document. Table 5: Glossary of Terms | Term | Definition | | --- | --- | | Legacy System | The existing system that is being replaced | | New Platform | The cloud-based platform that is being implemented | | Data Migration | The process of transferring data from the legacy system to the new platform |

question: What is the purpose of the data mapping document?
answer: Document that maps data fields from legacy system to new platform
answer_paragraph: Appendix B: Migration Tools and Resources The following table provides a list of migration tools and resources that will be used during the migration process. Table 6: Migration Tools and Resources | Tool/Resource | Description | | --- | --- | | Migration Software | Software used to extract, transform, and load data | | Data Mapping Document | Document that maps data fields from legacy system to new platform | | Training Manual | Manual that provides training and guidance to end-users on the new system |
